metadata.name: sow-generator
metadata.description: Statement of Work (SOW) generator for Equinox IT - creates consistent, professional SOWs from user input
metadata.author: Equinox IT

when_to_use: This skill activates when the user wants to create a Statement of Work document for a consulting engagement.
purpose: Generate consistent, repeatable high-quality Statements of Work using the SOW_Simple_Service_Template.DOCX
tone: Professional, client-facing consulting tone. No fluff; concise, confident, but friendly. Content should be consistent even if user notes are scrappy.

placeholders.name: SOW_NUMBER_AND_TITLE
placeholders.description: The number of the SOW and the Title of the Work. Format: 'Company Name - SOWnn - Name of the work'

placeholders.name: SOW_CONSULTANT
placeholders.description: Name(s) of the Equinox consultant(s) engaged in the work

placeholders.name: SOW_CONSULTANTS_ROLE
placeholders.description: Role title of the Equinox consultant(s)

placeholders.name: SOW_SERVICE_DESCRIPTION
placeholders.description: High level description of service being provided. Usually a block of text and then high level bullets listing key services

placeholders.name: SOW_ASSUMPTIONS
placeholders.description: All assumptions needed to allow successful delivery of the Service Description

placeholders.name: SOW_EXCLUSIONS
placeholders.description: Things excluded from the engagement. Brief statement followed by bullet points

placeholders.name: SOW_FORMAL_DELIVERABLES
placeholders.description: What will be produced and delivered by Equinox IT (scripts, documents, terraform, applications, etc.)

placeholders.name: SOW_REPORTING
placeholders.description: Description of reporting to be done during the SOW (weekly project letter, etc.)
placeholders.default: This is a small SOW - no reporting will be provided

placeholders.name: SOW_BILLING_BASIS
placeholders.description: Whether engagement is Fixed Cost or Time and Materials

placeholders.name: SOW_TASK_DESCRIPTION
placeholders.description: Bullet point tasks as a plan of action the Consultant will carry out

placeholders.name: SOW_TASK_HOURS
placeholders.description: Estimate of hours for each task in SOW_TASK_DESCRIPTION

placeholders.name: SOW_CLIENT_NAME
placeholders.description: Company name entering into the SOW with Equinox IT

conditionals.action: Prompt for all notes at once, auto-fill all sections

steps.title: Get SOW Number and Title
steps.description: Prompt for the SOW number and title. Format: 'Company Name - SOWnn - Name of the work'

steps.title: Get Consultant Details
steps.description: Prompt for consultant name(s) and role title. Check if multiple consultants.

steps.title: Get Service Description
steps.description: Ask for service description or offer to create one for review

steps.title: Get Assumptions
steps.description: Ask for assumptions or offer to draft based on service description

steps.title: Get Exclusions
steps.description: Suggest exclusions based on service description and assumptions, ask for review

steps.title: Get Deliverables
steps.description: Ask for deliverables or suggest based on service description and assumptions

steps.title: Get Billing Contact
steps.description: Prompt for billing contact name, company, and email

steps.title: Get Reporting
steps.description: Ask for reporting requirements. For small SOWs, suggest 'no reporting'. For larger ones, suggest weekly project letter.

steps.title: Get Billing Basis
steps.description: Ask if engagement is Fixed Cost or Time and Materials

steps.title: Get Task Descriptions
steps.description: Ask for task breakdown or offer to create. List as bullet points showing plan of high-level tasks.

steps.title: Get Task Hours
steps.description: Suggest hour estimates for each task. Show to user for approval. Ensure order matches task descriptions.

steps.title: Get Hourly Rate
steps.description: Prompt for hourly rate in NZ Dollar format

steps.title: Get Client Name
steps.description: Prompt for the company name entering into the SOW

steps.title: Review SOW
steps.description: Show complete SOW in preview for user to review and edit

steps.title: Generate Document
steps.description: Generate final MS Word document using SOW_Simple_Service_Template.DOCX. Sanitize filename (remove /, \, :, etc.)

validation.message: Title must be in format: 'Company Name - SOW## - Work Name'
Hours must be a number (e.g., 40, not 'forty')
Rate must be a number in NZD
Total cost must be a number
Must be 'Fixed Cost' or 'Time and Materials'

examples.title: Create SOW for Cloud Migration
examples.user_says: Create an SOW for Acme Corp cloud migration project
actions: Prompt for SOW number and title (e.g., 'Acme Corp - SOW01 - Cloud Migration Assessment')
Ask for service description or suggest based on cloud migration
Get assumptions (e.g., access to systems, timeline)
Determine billing basis (Fixed Cost or T&M)
Break down tasks with hour estimates

examples.title: SOW Number and Title Format
examples.user_says: What's the correct format for the SOW title?
actions: Explain format: 'Company Name - SOW## - Work Name'
examples.result: Example: 'Acme Corp - SOW01 - Cloud Migration Assessment'

examples.title: Numeric Validation
actions: Explain that hours must be numeric

common_errors.solution: Remove special characters from filename. Use hyphens or underscores instead.
Ensure email contains @ and valid domain (e.g., name@company.com)

common_errors.cause: Hours or rate entered as text instead of numbers
common_errors.solution: Enter numeric values only (e.g., 80 hours, not 'eighty hours')
